overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City at night. The car navigates through dense neon-lit commercial streets, underpasses, and elevated highways, showcasing the game's signature cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant signage and futuristic architecture.

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection marked with hotel signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow neon-lit streets, making turns between dense commercial buildings with Japanese-inspired architecture

multi-story buildings with wooden facades and illuminated windows

tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated sections visible in the distance
pink neon sign with the number 18 and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through narrow, neon-lit commercial streets lined with Japanese-inspired architecture. The camera follows the car as it turns at an intersection marked by a purple hotel sign, with the massive tower building visible in the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from surrounding signs and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated roadway passing under concrete overpasses

events.description: vehicle enters dark concrete underpass with reduced lighting
exits underpass into open plaza area with construction cranes visible

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated roadway, passing under concrete overpasses and through brief covered sections

notable_agents.action: distant car traveling in the same direction ahead on the elevated road

entered.detail: dark concrete overhead structure blocking the sky
large yellow construction cranes silhouetted against the night sky
purple neon sign reading TEN with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an elevated roadway, passing under dark concrete overpasses that temporarily obscure the skyline. The scene transitions from the covered underpass to an open plaza area where construction cranes are visible against the night sky. The tower building remains visible in the distance throughout the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gas station and parking structure with red structural elements

events.description: vehicle enters covered gas station area with overhead canopy
exits covered structure and approaches highway exit ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered urban infrastructure including a gas station and parking garage with red painted beams

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading Amber with Japanese characters below
traditional red torii gate structure spanning the street
large overhead roof structure covering fuel pumps
enclosed parking garage with red painted structural beams and ceiling
overhead highway signs pointing to Westbrook and Charter Hill

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a narrow street marked by a Japanese torii gate and Amber neon sign, then enters a covered gas station area with red structural elements. The scene transitions through enclosed parking structures with artificial lighting before approaching the highway exit marked by directional signs to Westbrook.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway exit ramp transitioning to open highway

events.description: vehicle accelerates onto open highway, leaving the covered exit area
road curves right revealing expansive city skyline with illuminated mega-buildings

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the open highway, navigating gentle curves while the city skyline becomes visible

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving in the left lane, overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large overhead highway directional signs mounted on metal framework
cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting
metal safety barriers lining both sides of the highway
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a wide open highway, leaving the covered infrastructure behind. The camera captures the transition from enclosed urban streets to the expansive highway with full sky visibility. The massive illuminated mega-buildings of the city skyline dominate the horizon as the road curves, revealing the scale of Night City's architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic city skyline views

agents.ego_description: cruising along the curved elevated highway, maintaining speed while the illuminated city skyline fills the view

notable_agents.action: red taillights of vehicle ahead in the distance on the curved highway

entered.detail: tall building with prominent vertical red neon lighting
dark silhouette of mountains on the horizon
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with various colored neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the curved elevated highway with the magnificent neon-lit city skyline dominating the view. The road stretches ahead with guardrails on both sides, while distant mountains are visible on the left horizon. The scene showcases the vast scale of the cyberpunk cityscape with towering illuminated buildings and vibrant neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that shifts from dense commercial streets to elevated highways and industrial transit zones. It begins by following a vehicle through narrow, Japanese-inspired streets where wet asphalt reflects vibrant purple and neon lights beneath the silhouette of a distant massive tower. As the car ascends onto an elevated roadway, the open skyline is intermittently obscured by dark concrete overpasses before opening up into a plaza area marked by towering construction cranes. The scene then shifts back into a narrow street passing a traditional torii gate and amber signage, leading the vehicle into a red-structured gas station and enclosed parking areas. Finally, the camera follows the car as it emerges from the artificial lighting of the structures toward a highway exit marked with directional signs to Westbrook.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from the enclosed urban infrastructure of the city into an expansive, open-air highway. It begins by accelerating away from covered streets, breaking into the open where the sky becomes visible and the massive, illuminated mega-buildings of the skyline first dominate the horizon. As the road curves, the scene expands to reveal the full scale of Night City's architecture, with towering neon advertisements and vibrant lights stretching across the cityscape. The camera then follows the vehicle along the elevated highway's guardrails, shifting the perspective to include distant mountains on the left horizon. Finally, the view opens further to showcase the vast, glowing metropolis under a dark sky, emphasizing the immense scale of the futuristic environment.
